_meta.description: TikTok restricted / approval-gated product categories. If a founder's category matches, the compliance guard flags it before generating a campaign and adjusts guidance. Informational only, not legal advice; the user verifies their own jurisdiction.

crypto.detail: Cryptocurrency, tokens, NFTs and most crypto financial products are prohibited or heavily restricted in paid ads and gated for organic promotion in many regions.
crypto.action: Avoid paid promotion; for organic, avoid financial-return claims and add risk disclaimers; verify regional eligibility.

financial_services.detail: Lending, investing, trading, and 'get rich' financial products require authorization and are subject to claims restrictions.
financial_services.action: No guaranteed-return or income claims; add disclaimers; verify licensing in target market.

health_supplements.detail: Health claims, supplements, and weight-management products are restricted; medical/therapeutic claims are prohibited.
health_supplements.action: No medical/therapeutic or before-after claims; route product claims through compliant language; verify regional rules.

healthcare.detail: Healthcare, telehealth, and medical devices face claims restrictions and may require authorization.
healthcare.action: No diagnostic/cure claims; add disclaimers; verify regional rules.

alcohol.detail: Alcohol promotion is prohibited or age-gated in most markets.
alcohol.action: Avoid promotion; if permitted, age-gate and follow regional law.

tobacco_vape.detail: Tobacco, vaping, and related products are prohibited.

gambling.detail: Gambling and real-money gaming are prohibited or licensing-gated.
gambling.action: Avoid promotion; verify licensing if permitted.

weapons.detail: Weapons, ammunition, and related accessories are prohibited.

cbd.detail: CBD and cannabis-adjacent products are restricted or prohibited depending on region.

dating.detail: Dating apps face content and targeting restrictions.
